# space-invaders Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-06

## Active Technologies
- Vanilla JavaScript (ES2020+), ES Modules + None — zero runtime dependencies; browser-native Web Audio API and HTML5 Canvas API only (001-syndicat-galactique)
- N/A — no persistence; scores reset on page refresh (per spec assumptions) (001-syndicat-galactique)
- Vanilla JavaScript (ES2020+), ES Modules + None — Web Audio API and HTML5 Canvas API are browser-native; one `<link>` to Google Fonts CDN for "Press Start 2P" pixel font (graceful fallback to Courier New) (001-rebrand-visual-overhaul)
- N/A — all state is session-scoped; `reducedMotion` preference is held in memory only (no localStorage per KISS) (001-rebrand-visual-overhaul)

- (001-syndicat-galactique)
